item.description:
Meeting Coach 0.5.0

  • Polish UI, 15s demo, role-based coaching setup, meeting-detected pill
  • Record benchmark baseline from laptop gate run
  • Fix build: disambiguate AdaptiveThresholds.multiplier reference
  • Make the gitignored ollama resource folder optional in the project spec
  • Apply review findings: overlay rendering, focus efficacy, builder fidelity, bench comparability
  • Add meeting auto-detect with a menu bar presence
  • Add the rubric advisor: evidence-backed suggestions, applied only on approval
  • Move progress to the main window and add focus goals
  • Unify rubrics with live coaching and add an in-app rubric builder
  • Add shareable recap export and persist reviews into session files
  • Add a live talk-share meter to the overlay and transcript panel
  • Add a first-launch demo that replays a sample meeting through the live pipeline
  • Start sessions instantly instead of blocking on the transcription download
  • Store the active rubric under Application Support instead of a dev path
  • Point thanks page at the v0.4.8 DMG
